name: Client Settings
desc: Client sends its locale, view distance, chat mode, chat colors, difficulty preference, and cape visibility.
notes: Sent by vanilla client every time settings change. The server stores locale for player language detection. View distance affects how many chunks the server sends. Rise 6.0 ClientSpoofer sends spoofed C15 to change the locale string for server-side language detection bypass and to set a fake view distance.

implementation.overview: C15PacketClientSettings reports the client's language, render distance, chat preferences, and cape setting to the server. The server uses locale for language-appropriate messages and view distance for chunk sending optimization. Rise 6.0's ClientSpoofer sends a crafted C15 with custom locale and view distance to bypass server-side client detection (some servers check locale to detect non-English clients as hacked).

modules.name: ClientSpoofer (Rise 6.0)
modules.purpose: Spoof client settings — particularly the locale and view distance — to bypass server-side client detection. Some servers check locale to detect non-English clients, and view distance to detect clients that modify render distance for PVP advantage.
modules.how_it_works: The module cancels the vanilla C15 and sends a spoofed one with en_US locale (to appear as English vanilla client), reduced view distance (to appear legit on competitive servers that force short render distance), and specific cape/chat settings. The spoofed packet is sent every time settings would normally be updated.
modules.vanilla_hook: NetHandlerPlayServer.processClientSettings(C15PacketClientSettings) — stores locale in player data (for language-specific messages), adjusts chunk send radius based on view distance. GameSettings.sendSettingsToServer() sends this when settings GUI is closed.
modules.anti_cheat_notes: Spoofing C15 is not detectable — the server trusts the client's reported settings. However, some servers use locale to detect non-English players for team assignment or language filtering. View distance affects chunk sending, so a longer view distance than the server allows may be clamped server-side.

implementation.general_hooks:
Client: GameSettings.sendSettingsToServer() sends C15. Rise 6.0 ClientSpoofer replaces vanilla C15 with spoofed values.

Server: NetHandlerPlayServer.processClientSettings(C15PacketClientSettings) updates EntityPlayerMP's settings cache.
implementation.client_variations:
Rise 6.0: ClientSpoofer intercepts C15 and replaces with spoofed locale/view distance.
Gugustus: ClientSpoof sends custom C15 with specified locale and view distance.
